entries.title: Missing Invariant Definitions
entries.summary: Value flows described without stating properties that must always hold

indicators: No explicit statement of what must always be true
design_context.description: The design describes value flows but doesn't state the properties that must always hold. Without explicit invariants, there's no way to verify correctness or detect violations.

entries.title: Unanalyzed Extraction Vectors
entries.summary: No consideration of whether attacker can extract more value than contributed

indicators: No mention of MEV, frontrunning, or flash loan scenarios
design_context.description: The design doesn't consider whether an attacker can extract more value than they contribute. Flash loans, sandwich attacks, and donation attacks are not addressed.

entries.title: Incentive Misalignment
entries.summary: Design creates incentives rewarding behavior contrary to protocol goals

indicators: Reward mechanisms that can be gamed by rational actors
Liquidation incentives that create cascading failures
design_context.description: The design creates incentives that reward behavior contrary to protocol goals. Rational actors deviate from intended usage because deviation is more profitable.
